name: Tic Tac Toc: El reencuentro
overview: Tic Tac Toc: El reencuentro is a Mexican comedy television series. It revolves around Tic Tac Toc - a popular children's musical group from the 1980s that seek to repeat their success 35 years later. Natalia, Pierre, Reynaldo and Carlos at first join forces to raise funds to support one of their members who is in need of a surgical procedure. However, each member has their dark secrets and quiet goals that they intend to achieve through this reunion. Together they will try to regain the brilliance and success they had 35 years ago, while the fraudulent businessman Tito Gambino will try to exploit them for his own gain.
